Package com.saperion.util.conversion

Class DefaultTypeConversionManager

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.util.conversion.DefaultConversionManager
com.saperion.util.conversion.DefaultTypeConversionManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
ConversionManager
public class DefaultTypeConversionManager extends DefaultConversionManager implements ConversionManager
Implementation of ConversionManager that returns converters that convert most default java types (primitives, their wrapper types, String, Date - as well as their subclasses - Calendar and arrays and implementations of List thereof ) to the fixed set int, double, String and Calendar and arrays thereof.
Author:
jschwarz
